
=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 80   

Maximum Height: 256   

Roughness: 10   

=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 4   

Height Variation: 1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.048   

Block: Gravel   

Width: 6   

Variation: 2   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 3   

smoothness: 0.8   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.032   

Block: Snow   

Width: 6   

Variation: 2   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 3   

smoothness: 0.8   

[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
